questions.question: Describe the primary difference between the Datagram Protocol (UDP) and the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) in terms of error control. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the differences in error control mechanisms, including handling of packet loss and corruption

questions.question: Explain the concept of flow control in the context of the Transmission Control Protocol (TCP). How does it prevent network congestion? (8 marks)
questions.hint: Elaborate on the role of windowing and acknowledgement packets in flow control, and how it ensures data is sent efficiently

questions.question: A TCP connection is established using the three-way handshake method. What are the three packets involved in this handshake, and what do they represent? (6 marks)
questions.hint: Identify SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK packets and explain their roles in establishing a TCP connection
